title: Blog excerpt
text: I've been thinking a lot about productivity lately. Not the kind that involves five apps and color-coded calendars — just the simple kind: do the thing, then do the next thing.

character_tips.maxim: Blog writing is the most-typed long-form content. Train it.
character_tips.knopych: 📝 BLOG MODE! Personal voice at speed!
character_tips.klavochka: Like a friend's diary, my dear 📖
